ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fee_schedules" (
  "fee_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee schedule */,
  "schedule_name" TEXT /* Name of the fee schedule */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the fee schedule starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the fee schedule ends */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the fee schedule is currently active */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the fee schedule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fee schedule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fee schedule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_types" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for class type */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "class_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the class */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_classes" (
  "sub_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for subclass */,
  "sub_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the subclass */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class it belongs to */,
  "sub_class_description" TEXT /* Description of the subclass */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fee_details" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee record */,
  "fee_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fee schedule */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class type */,
  "sub_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subclass */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the fee */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., tuition, late fee) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fee_details_sub_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_class_id") REFERENCES sub_classes ("sub_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fee_details_fee_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("fee_schedule_id") REFERENCES fee_schedules ("fee_schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fee_details_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES class_types ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date the student is expected to graduate */,
  "student_status" TEXT /* Status of the student (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student making the payment */,
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fee being paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_fee_id FOREIGN KEY ("fee_id") REFERENCES fee_details ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scholarships" (
  "scholarship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scholarship */,
  "scholarship_name" TEXT /* Name of the scholarship */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the scholarship */,
  "scholarship_type" TEXT /* Type of scholarship (e.g., merit-based, need-based) */,
  "eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the scholarship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scholarship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_scholarships" (
  "student_scholarship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the student scholarship record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student receiving the scholarship */,
  "scholarship_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scholarship awarded */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the scholarship was awarded */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the scholarship expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_scholarship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_scholarships_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_scholarships_scholarship_id FOREIGN KEY ("scholarship_id") REFERENCES scholarships ("scholarship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid" (
  "aid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial aid record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student receiving financial aid */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the financial aid */,
  "aid_type" TEXT /* Type of financial aid (e.g., loan, grant) */,
  "disbursal_date" TEXT /* Date the aid was disbursed */,
  "repayment_terms" TEXT /* Terms of repayment for the financial aid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student enrolled */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade earned by the student in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_enrollments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES class_types ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., Credit Card, Bank Transfer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the transaction */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related payment */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method used */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., Completed, Pending) */,
  "transaction_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "total_revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue reported */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "budget_name" TEXT /* Name of the budget */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget ends */,
  "total_budget" TEXT /* Total budget amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Projected revenue */,
  "expenses" TEXT /* Projected expenses */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id")
)
